responses.question: How many hours per week do you typically spend on your Delivery Partner responsibilities?
In your Delivery Partner role, what are the top 3 activities where you spend most of your time and feel you add real value?
responses.answer:
1. Understanding the project concerns from both GDC team & InRegion team and bring it to closure
2. Relationship building with InRegion - so that they dont escalate issues to Nilo's directs
3. Regular reviews with InRegion
4. Staffing issues - Although this is out of scope for DP.

responses.question: Still in your Delivery Partner role — what are 2 activities you regularly have to do, but feel are low-value or unproductive?
responses.answer:
1. Staffing discussions (Swaps & releases)
2. GDC associate Skill issues

responses.question: How many hours per week do you typically spend on your Cloud Leader responsibilities?
In your Cloud Leader role, what are the top 3 activities where you spend most of your time and feel you add real value?
responses.answer:
1.  AI process adoption; enablement & planning
2. Staffing, Talent progression path; Focusing on associate growth
3. Stream the leadership messages & focus areas to the team
4. Creating new processes and driving governance activities and reporting

responses.question: Still in your Cloud Leader role — what are 2 activities you regularly have to do, but feel are low-value or unproductive?
responses.answer:
1. Staffing & operations related discussions.
2. Basic career conversations
3. Interviews - Lots and lots of interviews

responses.question: What is the single biggest thing that prevents you from spending time on what matters most in your role?
responses.answer:
1. Hiring - Potential candidates have to go through 'effective' prior screenings
2. Staffing and associate movement and release discussions 
3. Self accountability with PM & Tech SPOCs in the project team is still a big challenge

responses.question: If you could redesign your week, what would you spend significantly more time on — and what would you hand off or stop doing?
responses.answer:
I will focus more on the following
--> Enable myself more on AI and identify areas and processes that can help drive faster & better outcomes for GDC. Automate..automate..automate
--> Learn from some of the GDC leaders on the art of telling Stories

I will hand off
--> Take myself from all associate staffing discussions - swaps, releases, inregion alignment on associate movement etc.,
